papers.title: World-Model Guided Policy Learning for Embodied Navigation
papers.summary: We present a world-model guided policy framework for embodied navigation. The method combines latent imagination and online correction to improve long-horizon control stability.
papers.summary_sentence: We present a world-model guided policy framework for embodied navigation. The method combines latent imagination and online correction to improve long-horizon control stability.
papers.method_summary: 方法总结：We present a world-model guided policy framework for embodied navigation. The method combines latent imagination and online correction to improve long-horizon control stability.
papers.conclusion_summary: 结论总结：We present a world-model guided policy framework for embodied navigation. The method combines latent imagination and online correction to improve long-horizon control stability.
papers.module_label: 具身智能（VLA / 世界模型 / 机器人）

papers.title: Tool-Using LLM Agents with Verifiable Reasoning
papers.summary: We introduce an LLM agent architecture with explicit tool planning and verifiable reasoning traces. Experiments show gains on coding, retrieval and decision benchmarks.
papers.summary_sentence: We introduce an LLM agent architecture with explicit tool planning and verifiable reasoning traces. Experiments show gains on coding, retrieval and decision benchmarks.
papers.method_summary: 方法总结：We introduce an LLM agent architecture with explicit tool planning and verifiable reasoning traces. Experiments show gains on coding, retrieval and decision benchmarks.
papers.conclusion_summary: 结论总结：We introduce an LLM agent architecture with explicit tool planning and verifiable reasoning traces. Experiments show gains on coding, retrieval and decision benchmarks.
